known_issues: Image upload option exists but uploaded images are not saving correctly with products — error occurring on save

existing_features.title: Fix the Admin page product form so that the base64-encoded image string captured from the file upload input is correctly included in the payload sent to the backend addProduct and updateProduct mutations. Ensure no error occurs on save and that the saved image persists and reloads correctly in the edit dialog.

Update the product display components (ProductCard, ProductDetail, Catalog) to render the product's stored image when available, falling back gracefully to the existing placeholder when no image is present.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update the backend product type to include an `image` field (of type `Text`) so that image data can be persisted alongside product details. Update all related CRUD functions (add, edit, get) to handle this new field.

projectName: Fix image upload not saving to backend for products
